nodes.id: ent:known_gap:Collection over the primary AOI on 10 May was severely degraded by persistent cumulus/stratocumulus cover, estimated at 90–95% scene obscuration across the central firing battery footprint. Only intermittent breaks along the northeastern access road and a portion of the perimeter berm were visible. As a result, analysts are unable to confirm the current count of transporter-erector-launchers (TELs) present at the site
nodes.name: Collection over the primary AOI on 10 May was severely degraded by persistent cumulus/stratocumulus cover, estimated at 90–95% scene obscuration across the central firing battery footprint. Only intermittent breaks along the northeastern access road and a portion of the perimeter berm were visible. As a result, analysts are unable to confirm the current count of transporter-erector-launchers (TELs) present at the site
